project.name: voxlblade
project.description: Game damage/optimization calculator built with Svelte and TypeScript, deployed on Vercel

nodes.name: Boost.ts
nodes.summary: Defines boost/perk effect definitions (BOOST_DEFS) and calculation helpers for minion absorption, frenzy, and penance mechanics.

nodes.name: BuffData.ts
nodes.summary: Central buff/debuff data definitions and processing pipeline. Contains BUFF_DEFS (1600+ lines of buff metadata), buff assembly, perk modifier application, and description formatting.

nodes.name: HealBoost.ts
nodes.summary: Calculates healing boost multipliers from various perk and buff sources. Aggregates healing effectiveness modifiers.

nodes.name: TypedDmgBoost.ts
nodes.summary: Calculates per-type damage boost multipliers based on active buffs and perk configurations.

nodes.name: defensivePerks.ts
nodes.summary: Defines and resolves defensive perk sources, computing damage reduction percentages from armor, DR perks, and draconic effects.

nodes.name: draconicBuffs.ts
nodes.summary: Handles draconic infusion buff generation, potency/duration multipliers, and ability debuff application for draconic guild builds.

nodes.name: perkAutoDebuffs.ts
nodes.summary: Determines which debuffs are automatically applied based on perk selections, HP fill thresholds, and proc coefficients.

nodes.name: weaponConditionalBoosts.ts
nodes.summary: Calculates conditional damage boosts that depend on weapon type and hit scope (e.g., behind target, on crit).

nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Empty barrel file. Constants are split into modular files under src/lib/constants/.

nodes.name: crit.ts
nodes.summary: Crit chance and crit damage calculation engine. Computes natural + extra crit sources, proc-chance-weighted crit, and detailed breakdowns.

nodes.name: defense.ts
nodes.summary: Defense resolution pipeline: aggregates flat and percentage defense sources, computes effective DR percentages, and resolves armor base defense.

nodes.name: utils.ts
nodes.summary: Shared utility functions: multiplier rounding, warding debuff math, HTML text highlighting, and proc chance calculation.

nodes.name: calcMinionAbsorptionPotency
nodes.summary: Calculates the minion absorption potency multiplier based on summon boost percentage and stack count.

nodes.name: calcFrenzyPct
nodes.summary: Calculates frenzy percentage from rage potency value.

nodes.name: getWeaponArtBuffs
nodes.summary: Returns buff entries generated by a named weapon art activation.

nodes.name: getTrueBalanceBuffs
nodes.summary: Computes the True Balance buff set based on perk amount and active debuffs, grouping by debuff type with potency/duration calculations.

nodes.name: getSpecificBuffModifiers
nodes.summary: Returns perk-specific modifier overrides for individual buffs (e.g., unique duration formulas).

nodes.name: getBastionBlessBonus
nodes.summary: Computes the Bastion Bless bonus for healing/shield buffs based on perk investment.

nodes.name: getGenericDebuffModifiers
nodes.summary: Applies generic debuff potency and duration modifiers from standard perk sources.

nodes.name: getTricksterReflection
nodes.summary: Calculates the Trickster Reflection damage multiplier based on buff state and warding debuff multiplier.

nodes.name: applyBuffPerkModifiers
nodes.summary: Main buff modifier pipeline: applies specific, generic, bastion, and trickster modifiers to all buffs based on active perks and rune.

nodes.name: applyToxinTransferDuration
nodes.summary: Extends Poison debuff duration based on Toxin Transfer perk stacks.

nodes.name: convertTailwindToWhirlwind
nodes.summary: Converts Tailwind buff to Whirlwind when appropriate perk is active, adjusting duration and potency.

nodes.name: getBuffDescription
nodes.summary: Generates formatted description text for a buff, including dynamic potency/damage reduction values.

nodes.name: getPerkBuffs
nodes.summary: Collects all buffs generated directly from perk selections using registered factory functions.

nodes.name: getActiveBuildBuffs
nodes.summary: Gathers all active buffs from a build including racial buffs, guild buffs, and mount buffs.

nodes.name: applyCauterizeConversion
nodes.summary: Converts Burn debuffs to Healing when Cauterize perk is active.

nodes.name: getBurnApplicationCount
nodes.summary: Returns the count of currently applied Burn debuff instances.

nodes.name: assembleActiveBuffs
nodes.summary: Master buff assembly: combines build buffs, perk buffs, weapon art buffs, applies modifiers, toxin transfer, tailwind conversion, and cauterize conversion.

nodes.name: calcBuffEffect
nodes.summary: Computes the numerical effect value (DR or potency) for a buff at a given potency level.

nodes.name: formatPerkDescription
nodes.summary: Replaces placeholder tokens in perk description strings with calculated potency values.

nodes.name: calculateHealBoost
nodes.summary: Aggregates all healing boost modifiers from perks, buffs, and enchantments into a single multiplier with full breakdown tracking.

nodes.name: calcTypedDmgBoosts
nodes.summary: Computes per-element damage and heal multipliers by evaluating active typed damage boost perks and buff potency.

nodes.name: getActiveDefensivePerkSources
nodes.summary: Resolves which defensive perks are active based on build state (HP fill, mounting, rage, darkness, etc.) and returns their DR contributions.

nodes.name: calcDefensivePotencyMult
nodes.summary: Computes the total defensive potency multiplier from draconic infusion and color effects.

nodes.name: getDraconicInfusionPotMult
nodes.summary: Returns draconic infusion potency multiplier for a given perk amount.

nodes.name: getDraconicInfusionDurMult
nodes.summary: Returns draconic infusion duration multiplier for a given perk amount.

nodes.name: getEffectiveDraconicInfusionPotency
nodes.summary: Computes the effective draconic infusion potency by assembling the buff and applying perk modifiers.

nodes.name: getDraconicInfusionBuff
nodes.summary: Constructs the full draconic infusion buff entry including color-based elemental effects, potency, and duration.

nodes.name: getDraconicAbilityDebuffs
nodes.summary: Generates the set of debuffs applied by draconic ability activation based on guild, rune, and color.

nodes.name: calcActualHpFillPct
nodes.summary: Computes actual HP fill percentage accounting for level scaling and protection stat.

nodes.name: getAutoDebuffs
nodes.summary: Determines all automatically applied debuffs from perk selections, checking proc coefficients, existing buffs, HP thresholds, and DoT status.

nodes.name: getWeaponConditionalBoost
nodes.summary: Returns conditional damage multiplier and label list for weapon-type-specific conditional perks.

nodes.name: calcElementalBoost
nodes.summary: Calculates elemental boost contribution to crit from a specific perk and stat value.

nodes.name: calcCrit
nodes.summary: Full crit calculation engine: computes natural crit chance, extra crit sources, proc-chance-weighted crit, crit damage multiplier, and produces detailed breakdowns for display.

nodes.name: resolveDefenseSources
nodes.summary: Aggregates flat and percentage defense sources into a combined effective DR with full tracking breakdown.

nodes.name: calcBaseArmorDefPct
nodes.summary: Computes base armor defense percentage for a given damage type from stat values.

nodes.name: roundMultiplier
nodes.summary: Rounds a multiplier value to 4 decimal places for consistent display and calculation.

nodes.name: calcWardingDebuffMultiplier
nodes.summary: Computes the warding stat's debuff reduction multiplier from warding stat value.

nodes.name: highlightText
nodes.summary: Returns HTML string with highlighted query matches in the given text for search UI.

nodes.name: highlightTextParts
nodes.summary: Splits text into matched/unmatched parts for Svelte component rendering of highlighted search results.

nodes.name: calcProcChance
nodes.summary: Calculates effective proc chance from base chance, proc coefficient, and optional scaling factor.

nodes.name: cdr.ts
nodes.summary: Cooldown reduction perk data definitions mapping perk names to CDR values for weapon arts, runes, and other sources

nodes.name: CDR_PERK_DATA
nodes.summary: Lookup map of perk names to their cooldown reduction percentage values, used by the CDR calculation pipeline

nodes.name: statboost.ts
nodes.summary: Applies offensive stat boost perks to player stats, handling percentage and flat modifiers with rounding and negative-stat balancing

nodes.name: OFFENSIVE_BOOSTS
nodes.summary: Configuration map defining which perks provide offensive stat boosts and how they modify stats

nodes.name: applyStatBoostPerks
nodes.summary: Main entry point that iterates active perk definitions and applies stat modifications, then finalizes rounding on all stat values

nodes.name: damageTypeResolve.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves and converts damage types through fire-air and air-to-magic conversion pipelines, applying bonus damage type additions

nodes.name: resolveDamageTypes
nodes.summary: Merges base damage types with bonus additions and returns a resolved map of damage type weights

nodes.name: applyFireAirConversion
nodes.summary: Splits fire damage into fire and air components using a conversion rate, rounding each contribution

nodes.name: applyAirToMagicConversion
nodes.summary: Converts air damage to magic via hex dark magic and echo incineration paths, cascading through fire-air conversion

nodes.name: _utils.ts
nodes.summary: Shared engine utilities providing round2 and round4 numeric rounding helpers used throughout the engine layer

nodes.name: round2
nodes.summary: Rounds a numeric value to 2 decimal places using Math.round

nodes.name: round4
nodes.summary: Rounds a numeric value to 4 decimal places using Math.round

nodes.name: build.ts
nodes.summary: Core build calculator orchestrating equipment accumulation, perk finalization, stat boosting, CDR, crit, buffs, and result derivation for the full damage pipeline

nodes.name: calcBuild
nodes.summary: Top-level build entry point: accumulates equipment, finalizes perks, derives all combat results in sequence

nodes.name: calcCDR
nodes.summary: Calculates cooldown reduction from rune and weapon art step reductions, race modifiers, and emotional state bonuses

nodes.name: calcBoosts
nodes.summary: Computes all damage boost multipliers from perks, summon count, rage, bounce, tailwind, speed, HP fill, darkness, and mount state

nodes.name: accumulateEquipment
nodes.summary: Aggregates stats and perks from race, guild, armor, weapons, rings, and enchantments into a unified state object

nodes.name: deriveResults
nodes.summary: Final results pipeline: applies stat boosts, emotional attack speed, gladiatorial rage, crit calc, warding debuff mult, and assembles buff/boost summaries

nodes.name: finalizePerks
nodes.summary: Applies perk effectiveness multipliers and cursed debuff reductions, then caps potency-based perks at their definitions' maximum

nodes.name: computeBuffs
nodes.summary: Assembles the active buff list from perks and applies Ork tenacity bonus adjustments to buff potency

nodes.name: data.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module that aggregates character, equipment, and weapon data loaders from the engine/data subdirectory

nodes.name: enchant.ts
nodes.summary: Enchantment engine handling application of enchantment modifiers to stats and perks, perk effectiveness scaling, infusion, and exclusive enchant slot enforcement

nodes.name: applyEnchantmentsToSlot
nodes.summary: Applies a list of named enchantments to a base stat/perk set in reverse order, handling modifiers, upgrades, and perk additions

nodes.name: applyPerkEffectiveness
nodes.summary: Scales perk values by effectiveness stacks and applies cursed debuff reductions, exempting certain base perks

nodes.name: applyInfusion
nodes.summary: Applies infusions from ring enchantments to weapon stats and perks, adding percentage-based modifiers

nodes.name: isExclusiveEnchant
nodes.summary: Checks whether an enchantment is flagged as exclusive and therefore restricted to its own equipment slot

nodes.name: enforceEnchantSlot
nodes.summary: Enforces mutual exclusion rules when an exclusive enchantment is selected, removing conflicting selections from other slots

nodes.name: format.ts
nodes.summary: Stat formatting utilities that convert internal stat keys to display-ready labels and human-readable values

nodes.name: formatStat
nodes.summary: Formats a numeric stat value as a display string with appropriate rounding and percentage suffix for percent-type stats

nodes.name: formatLabel
nodes.summary: Converts a camelCase stat key into a human-readable label by inserting spaces before capitals and title-casing

nodes.name: shrine.ts
nodes.summary: Shrine tier multiplier system that applies stat and scaling bonuses based on shrine upgrade level

nodes.name: SHRINE_MULTIPLIERS
nodes.summary: Array of multiplier values indexed by shrine tier, defining stat and scaling bonus percentages at each upgrade level

nodes.name: applyShrineToScalings
nodes.summary: Applies shrine tier multipliers to weapon damage scaling percentages (dex, str, int, etc.)

nodes.name: applyShrineToStats
nodes.summary: Applies shrine tier multipliers to weapon stat values (damage, speed, defense, etc.)

nodes.name: weapon.ts
nodes.summary: Weapon calculation engine that merges blade/handle or glove/essence parts, resolves weapon types, applies shrine bonuses, handles hybrid weapons, and computes monk rank scaling

nodes.name: MONK_RANK_MULTIPLIER
nodes.summary: Multiplier applied to monk weapon stats based on guild rank tier

nodes.name: calcWeapon
nodes.summary: Calculates a standard blade+handle weapon by delegating to the generic weapon calculator with blade/handle data lookups

nodes.name: calcMonkWeapon
nodes.summary: Calculates a monk glove+essence weapon with rank-based stat bonuses and shrine application

nodes.name: buildWeaponResult
nodes.summary: Assembles the final weapon result object from merged scalings, stats, perks, and resolved weapon type metadata

nodes.name: calcWeaponGeneric
nodes.summary: Generic weapon calculator that extracts damage/scalings from parts, merges perks, applies shrine, and builds the result

nodes.name: mergeScalingsAndStats
nodes.summary: Merges two weapon parts' scalings and stats, applying shrine multipliers and detecting hybrid weapon conditions

nodes.name: resolveWeaponType
nodes.summary: Determines the weapon classification (sword, spear, axe, etc.) from handle/blade types and applicable perks

nodes.name: Runebasedmg.ts
nodes.summary: Rune base damage definitions and heal-scaling calculations for rune abilities. Defines RUNE_DMG_DEFS data table and calculateRuneHealScaling which integrates with heal boost system.

nodes.name: SummonData.ts
nodes.summary: Summon stat calculations and summon entity data maps. Provides calcSummonStat, calcMaxSummonCount, SUMMON_MAP and WA_SUMMON_MAP for summon-based gameplay mechanics.

nodes.name: mountRunes.ts
nodes.summary: Mount rune definitions data table. Exports MOUNT_RUNE_DEFS describing rune effects available on mounted gameplay builds.

nodes.name: procCoefficients.ts
nodes.summary: Proc coefficient lookup tables for weapons, weapon arts, runes, and perks. Defines per-source proc chances and default coefficient values.

nodes.name: weapon base dmg.ts
nodes.summary: Weapon base damage lookup table. Exports WEAPON_BASE_DMG mapping weapon names to their base damage values.

nodes.name: dmgTypes.ts
nodes.summary: Damage type badge configuration. Exports BADGE_CONFIG defining visual badge properties for each damage type in the UI.

nodes.name: character.ts
nodes.summary: Character data accessors for races, guilds, and perks. Loads JSON data and provides lookup functions getRace, getGuild, getPerk, getGuildRank, and isMonkGuild.

nodes.name: equipment.ts
nodes.summary: Equipment data accessors for rings, runes, enchantments, and armors. Loads JSON data and provides lookup functions getEnchant, getRing, getRune, and getArmorPart.

nodes.name: weapons.ts
nodes.summary: Weapon part data accessors for blades, handles, gloves, and essences. Loads JSON data and provides lookup functions getBlade, getHandle, getGlove, and getEssence.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Core TypeScript type definitions and shared utility constants for the entire calculator. Defines stat keys, percent stats, damage type colors/priority, scaling-to-boost mappings, upgrade logic, and proc coefficient helpers.

nodes.name: calculateRuneHealScaling
nodes.summary: Calculates heal scaling for rune-based abilities by calling calculateHealBoost from HealBoost module.

nodes.name: calcSummonStat
nodes.summary: Calculates a summon's effective stat value based on base stat, boost percentage, and level.

nodes.name: calcMaxSummonCount
nodes.summary: Calculates the maximum number of active summons based on player perks.

nodes.name: getMountRuneDef
nodes.summary: Looks up a mount rune definition by its name from the MOUNT_RUNE_DEFS table.

nodes.name: getRace
nodes.summary: Looks up a race definition by name from loaded race JSON data.

nodes.name: getGuild
nodes.summary: Looks up a guild definition by name from loaded guild JSON data.

nodes.name: getPerk
nodes.summary: Looks up a perk definition by name from loaded perk JSON data.

nodes.name: getGuildRank
nodes.summary: Retrieves a specific rank's data from a given guild, with fallback to the guild's base stats.

nodes.name: isMonkGuild
nodes.summary: Checks whether a given guild name belongs to the monk guild type.

nodes.name: getEnchant
nodes.summary: Looks up an enchantment definition by name from loaded enchantment JSON data.

nodes.name: getRing
nodes.summary: Looks up a ring definition by name from loaded ring JSON data.

nodes.name: getRune
nodes.summary: Looks up a rune definition by name from loaded rune JSON data.

nodes.name: getArmorPart
nodes.summary: Looks up an armor part definition by name and type (helmet, chestplate, boots) from loaded armor JSON data.

nodes.name: getBlade
nodes.summary: Looks up a blade weapon part by name from loaded blade JSON data.

nodes.name: getHandle
nodes.summary: Looks up a handle weapon part by name from loaded handle JSON data.

nodes.name: getGlove
nodes.summary: Looks up a glove weapon part by name from loaded glove JSON data.

nodes.name: getEssence
nodes.summary: Looks up an essence weapon part by name from loaded essence JSON data.

nodes.name: applyUpgrade
nodes.summary: Applies upgrade level scaling to weapon stats, interpolating between base and max values up to UPGRADE_MAX.

nodes.name: getProcCoeffValue
nodes.summary: Extracts the numeric proc coefficient value from a proc coefficient config object.

nodes.name: canProc
nodes.summary: Determines whether a proc coefficient configuration allows proccing, using getProcCoeffValue internally.

nodes.name: Guilds Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 6 guilds (Gladiator, Cursed, Cleric, Scholar, Knight, +1 more). Each guild has 3 ranks with scaling stats (defense, boosts, resistance, tenacity) and perks that increase in amount per rank. Defines the guild progression system for character builds.

nodes.name: Perks Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON array of 200+ perk definitions (3688 lines). Each perk has a name, detailed description, and tags array classifying it (e.g., Defensive, Offensive, Buff, Debuff, Rune, Armor, Weapon, Mobility). This is the master perk registry referenced throughout the damage calculation system.

nodes.name: Races Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 10 playable races (Human, Half-Ork, Elf, Dark Elf, Dragon Blooded, Ork, High Elf, Arborian, Kitsune, Bunikin). Each has a name, passive description, and optional statModifiers/cooldownModifiers/globalArmorPenetration. Defines racial bonuses affecting character stats.

nodes.name: Armors Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 50+ armor sets. Each entry has a name, sharedPart (upgrade, stat bonuses like element boosts/defense/tenacity, perkName with amount), and parts array (Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings with descriptions). Covers the full armor equipment system for the damage calculator.

nodes.name: Enchantments Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 51 enchantments split into two categories: unAscended (24 entries, basic stat multipliers/additions) and Ascended (27 entries, stronger effects with special named effects like Frenzy, Undead Might, Perfection). Each has stacking rules (exclusive/multi), stat modifiers with multiplier/addition types, and optional effects array.

nodes.name: Rings Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 35 accessory rings. Each defines a name, flavor description, upgrade level, stat bonuses (element boosts, defense, speed, jump, attack speed, tenacity, etc.), and a single perkName with amount. Rings serve as the accessory equipment slot in the build calculator.

nodes.name: Runes Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 41 active rune abilities. Each defines a name, description, stat bonuses, cooldown value, and optional perkName/amount. Runes provide activatable abilities with cooldowns including combat moves, summons, mounts, buffs, and offensive spells.

nodes.name: Blades Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 40+ blade weapons. Each entry defines tier (1-4), attackSpeed, stat scalings (physical/fire/water/earth/air/hex/holy/magic/dexterity with type multipliers and boost values), optional perks with amounts, and bladeType (Small/Medium/Heavy Blade, Hammer Head). Core weapon component data.

nodes.name: Essences Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 40+ essence weapon components. Each defines tier (1-3), attackSpeed, stat scalings, optional perks, and essenceType. Essences mirror blade stat patterns but serve as the secondary weapon component in the damage calculator's weapon assembly system.

nodes.name: Gloves Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 22 glove/shield weapons across tiers 1-4. Each defines attackSpeed, stat scalings (including physicalType multipliers), perks with amounts, and gloveType (Gloves or Shield). Tier 4 entries are endgame with higher scalings, more perks, and unique spirit perks.

nodes.name: Handles Data
nodes.summary: JSON array of 40+ weapon handles. Each defines tier (1-3), attackSpeed, stat scalings, optional perks, and handleType (Medium/Long Handle, Pole). Handles are the secondary weapon component that combines with blades, providing additional stats and perks to the assembled weapon.

nodes.name: DoTDamage.ts
nodes.summary: Damage-over-Time calculations: defines DoT types (Bleed/Burn/Poison), stat scalings, base damage formulas, potency multipliers, Caustic Slow calculations, and builder-to-game value conversion.

nodes.name: Perkbasedmg.ts
nodes.summary: Perk-based damage definitions: HP gate system, Springblast damage, and PERK_DMG_DEFS array defining ~25 perks with base damage, hits, damage types, scalings, proc coefficients, and secondary effects.

nodes.name: draconicColorEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Draconic color attack stats and multipliers: maps 6 colors (fire/air/earth/water/holy/hex) to damage multipliers, speed, stun, knockback, and special effects for draconic rune infusion.

nodes.name: raceEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Race-based conditional effects: HP-gated race passives (Human below 50% HP), Ork tenacity buff filtering, and bonus calculation based on active buff count.

nodes.name: getDotBase
nodes.summary: Returns flat base damage before potency multiplier using formula: 1.75 × (1 + inflictionPotency / 1.1)

nodes.name: getDotPotencyMult
nodes.summary: Returns potency multiplier: (1 + dotPotency)^(1 + min(1, dotPotency)). Exponent caps at 2 when dotPotency >= 1.0.

nodes.name: calcDotTick
nodes.summary: Computes a single DoT tick: calls getDotBase and getDotPotencyMult, rounds result to 3 decimals.

nodes.name: calcCausticSlow
nodes.summary: Computes Caustic Slow damage: scales with Poison Potency, gains bonus multiplier when enemy has Slow debuff active.

nodes.name: toGamePotency
nodes.summary: Converts builder-display perk value to game-internal value (multiplies by 0.1).

nodes.name: gateThreshold
nodes.summary: Returns the HP threshold for an HpGate: returns undefined if gate is null or alwaysActiveAtPerkAmount is met, otherwise uses getThreshold or static hpThreshold.

nodes.name: isHpGateActive
nodes.summary: Checks if an HpGate condition is met: calls gateThreshold, compares hpFillPct against threshold based on aboveThreshold flag.

nodes.name: calcSpringblastBaseDamage
nodes.summary: Calculates Springblast base damage: (6 + 2 × perkAmount) × (1 + 0.1 × perkAmount).

nodes.name: getDraconicColorDmgMultiplier
nodes.summary: Looks up draconic color damage multiplier from DRACONIC_COLOR_MAP, returns 1 if color not found.

nodes.name: getActiveRaceEffect
nodes.summary: Finds active race conditional effect by raceName and checks HP gate condition via isHpGateActive.

nodes.name: getOrkTenacityBuffs
nodes.summary: Filters buffs to find those eligible for Ork Tenacity: excludes debuffs, self-debuffs, and neutral buffs.

nodes.name: calcOrkTenacityBonus
nodes.summary: Calculates Ork Tenacity bonus: 0.1 × count of qualifying buffs from getOrkTenacityBuffs.

nodes.name: enchantTooltip.ts
nodes.summary: Generates human-readable tooltip text for weapon enchantments, formatting stat modifiers and effects as display strings.

nodes.name: getEnchantTooltipText
nodes.summary: Builds an array of formatted stat lines and effect descriptions from an enchantment definition, used for tooltip rendering.

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel/re-export module that aggregates and re-exports the damage calculation engine sub-modules (build, weapon, enchant, shrine, data).

nodes.name: store.ts
nodes.summary: Svelte writable stores for the active build state and computed calculation result, with actions to modify enchantments, guild, and load persisted builds from localStorage.

nodes.name: loadBuild
nodes.summary: Reads a serialized build from localStorage and hydrates the build store with parsed JSON data.

nodes.name: setEnchantment
nodes.summary: Updates the build store's enchantment at a given slot and index, enforcing slot constraints via enforceEnchantSlot.

nodes.name: clearBuild
nodes.summary: Resets the build store to its default empty state.

nodes.name: setGuild
nodes.summary: Sets the guild name and rank on the build store, triggering downstream recalculation.

nodes.name: Deploy static content to Pages
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds the Svelte app and deploys to GitHub Pages. Triggers on push to main or manual workflow_dispatch. Uses Node.js 24, runs npm install and build, uploads the dist artifact, then deploys via actions/deploy-pages. Concurrency group 'pages' prevents parallel deploys.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Build job that checks out code, sets up Node.js 24, runs npm install and npm run build, then uploads the dist directory as a GitHub Pages artifact.

nodes.name: deploy
nodes.summary: Deploy job that depends on the build job. Deploys the uploaded artifact to GitHub Pages using actions/deploy-pages.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest for voxlblade. Defines the Svelte+Vite app with Svelte 5, TypeScript 6, Vite 8, PWA support, and Playwright testing. Single runtime dependency is @vercel/analytics.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript config that simply extends tsconfig.app.json. Acts as the default project reference.

nodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.summary: Application TypeScript config targeting ES2023 with module ESNext. Extends @tsconfig/svelte, enables allowJs/checkJs for Svelte file interop, includes all src/** TS/JS/Svelte files.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: Node/bundler TypeScript config for vite.config.ts. Targets ES2023, uses bundler module resolution, enforces strict linting (noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, erasableSyntaxOnly).

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment config. Builds with npm run build, outputs to dist, uses Vite framework preset. Sets cache headers: immutable for assets, no-cache for sw.js and index.html.

nodes.name: .fallowrc.json
nodes.summary: Fallow (duplicate detection tool) config. Entry points at src/index.ts and src/main.ts. Requires 3+ occurrences for duplicate reporting. Has ignoreExports for modal components and constants with specific exports.

nodes.name: fallow-output.json
nodes.summary: Fallow duplicate analysis output report. Contains 782 lines of detected code duplication patterns across the codebase.

nodes.name: fallow-security.json
nodes.summary: Fallow security analysis output. Contains 1391 lines of security-related code pattern findings for the codebase.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: AI agent instructions. Mandates using Context7 for library documentation lookup for Svelte, SvelteKit, TypeScript, Drizzle, Better Auth, Vite, Tailwind, and Vitest. Prohibits relying on training data.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Standard Svelte+TS+Vite template README. Covers IDE setup, SvelteKit comparison, HMR behavior, and TypeScript configuration rationale. Generic template documentation.

nodes.name: ts-errors.txt
nodes.summary: Empty file for TypeScript error output. Currently contains no error data.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Vite SPA entry HTML. Minimal document shell with a single #app div mount point and module script loading /src/main.ts. Standard Svelte/Vite boilerplate.

nodes.name: ui-upgrade.md
nodes.summary: Design document outlining the Voxlblade UI upgrade plan with 8 phases: modal extraction, toast system, header extraction, CSS consolidation, responsive improvements, performance, accessibility, and build comparison.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore patterns configuration file for the understand-anything analysis tool, specifying files and directories to exclude from analysis.

nodes.name: decode_full.mjs
nodes.summary: Standalone Node.js script that decodes and verifies a full build configuration — accumulates stats from race, guild, armor, ring, rune, blade, handle, and infusions, applies enchantments and shrine multipliers, finalizes perks with effectiveness modifiers, and prints accumulated stats, weapon damage types, and core stats.

nodes.name: getPerk
nodes.summary: Looks up a perk definition by name from the parsed perks.json data.

nodes.name: getArmorPart
nodes.summary: Retrieves a specific armor part (Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings) from an armor set by name and part type.

nodes.name: applyUpgrade
nodes.summary: Applies upgrade level multiplier to stats: positive stats multiplied by (1 + level*0.1), negative stats divided. Preserves armor penetration unchanged.

nodes.name: applyEnchantmentsToSlot
nodes.summary: Applies enchantment effects to an equipment slot in reverse order, handling multiplier/additive stat modifications, perk effectiveness, and bonus multipliers with upgrade level support.

nodes.name: applyShrine
nodes.summary: Applies shrine tier multiplier to stats (tier 1=3.0x down to tier 5=1.0x).

nodes.name: applyInfusion
nodes.summary: Applies infusion effect by halving all stats while preserving perks unchanged.

nodes.name: finalizePerks
nodes.summary: Finalizes raw perks by applying Perk Effectiveness and Cursed multipliers, converting Buckler to Parry, and distributing perk tags to potency types (Bleed/Burn/Poison).

nodes.name: app.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS stylesheet defining design tokens (--bg, --surface, --accent, --radius, etc.), box-sizing reset, and component styles for weapon-art average total box and wild-bolt UI elements.

nodes.name: App.svelte
nodes.summary: Root Svelte component (3699 lines) orchestrating the entire Voxlblade calculator — manages build state, renders all equipment modals (race, guild, armor, ring, rune, blade, handle, glove, essence), weapon art selection, buff/debuff lists, damage analysis tabs, and integrates sub-components like DamageAnalyzer, BuffList, BuildSaves, and LevelBar.

nodes.name: BaseDamageCalc.svelte
nodes.summary: Core damage calculation Svelte component (2472 lines) that computes per-hit damage breakdowns by damage type, applies armor penetration, defense resolution, crit scaling, damage-type boosts, draconic bonuses, self-damage, and perk-on-hit effects for M1/M2/WA/Rune attacks.

nodes.name: BuffList.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (765 lines) that computes and displays active buffs/debuffs from items, perks, weapon arts, race effects, draconic infusions, auto-debuffs, and proc coefficients — with per-source grouping, duration display, and potency calculation.

nodes.name: BuildSaves.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (608 lines) managing build save/load/export/import with localStorage persistence, named save slots, confirm-delete UX, copy-to-clipboard export, file import, and integration with the EmotionalTracker and toast system.

nodes.name: CdrStepsCalc.svelte
nodes.summary: Small Svelte component (92 lines) that renders a step-by-step cooldown reduction visualization showing each CDR multiplier step, the running CD value, and floor/minimum-CD capping.

nodes.name: CritIcon.svelte
nodes.summary: Minimal Svelte component (13 lines) rendering a crit strike icon as a gradient-filled SVG star/arrow shape with configurable size.

nodes.name: DamageAnalyzer.svelte
nodes.summary: Largest Svelte component (6565 lines) performing full damage analysis — computes weapon stats, applies all boosts/buffs/debuffs/crit/draconic effects/self-damage/DoT/totems/summons, resolves defenses, calculates healing, and feeds results to BaseDamageCalc and ScalingBreakdownRow for per-attack breakdowns.

nodes.name: debuffCombatEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines combat effect implementations for debuffs (Weakness, Shatter, Sticky, Sticky variants, Electrical Rend, Despair) — each with description functions, damage multipliers, defense reductions, and type-specific damage multipliers including Melting Slime synergy.

nodes.name: draconicRunes.ts
nodes.summary: Implements draconic rune and dragon infusion bonus calculations — applies per-stack elemental damage bonuses based on draconic color, with both mutation (apply) and read-only (get) variants for runes context and infusion context.

nodes.name: applyDraconicBonuses
nodes.summary: Applies both draconic runes bonus and dragon infusion bonus to damage type scaling map.

nodes.name: getDraconicBonuses
nodes.summary: Returns combined draconic runes and infusion bonus as a damage type bonus map without mutating input.

nodes.name: selfDamagePerks.ts
nodes.summary: Defines self-damage perk mechanics for Undead Might, Explosive Charge, Dark Magic, and Bombardier — each with hit-type applicability, self-damage fraction, damage type split, DR per stack, and harmonic-series multi-target falloff calculation.

nodes.name: calcSelfDamage
nodes.summary: Calculates self-damage from a perk definition: applies self-damage fraction, DR per stack multiplier, harmonic-series multi-target falloff, and defense multipliers per damage type.

nodes.name: stanceOverlays.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves combat stance overlays (Blaster Ring, Locked And Loaded, Cosmic Ray, Mine) based on weapon context — determines alternative attack type and whether it replaces M2 only or all attacks, with per-condition matching priority.

nodes.name: resolveStanceOverlay
nodes.summary: Iterates through stance overlay definitions, returning the first matching overlay result based on weapon context or null if none match.

nodes.name: Weaponartcheck.ts
nodes.summary: Validates weapon art requirements against current build — checks scaling thresholds, stat requirements, weapon type, guild, bothParts, and atLeastOneScaling conditions, with detailed unmet-requirement reporting.

nodes.name: checkWA
nodes.summary: Returns boolean indicating whether a weapon art meets all requirements (scaling, stats, weapon type, guild, bothParts) for the current build.

nodes.name: getUnmetReqs
nodes.summary: Returns human-readable array of unmet requirements for a weapon art, covering guild, weapon type, bothParts, scaling, and stat requirements.

nodes.name: weaponArts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines all weapon art entries (WEAPON_ARTS array) with names, descriptions, cooldowns, base damage formulas, damage/scaling types, hit breakdowns, requirements (scaling/stat/weapon-type/guild/bothParts), and monk/category flags.

nodes.name: DidYouMean.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (110 lines) displaying fuzzy-search suggestions when no exact modal search results are found — renders clickable chips with highlighted text for name/perk matches.

nodes.name: DmgTotalTooltip.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte 5 component (175 lines) rendering a damage total tooltip with a mini pie chart breakdown by damage type, supporting crit toggle and animated display.

nodes.name: DraconicAbilityStats.svelte
nodes.summary: Small Svelte component (42 lines) displaying draconic ability stat rows: damage type, scaling, poise damage, and optional holy/water healing values with color-coded styling.

nodes.name: EmotionalTracker.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (235 lines) managing the Emotional perk state (buff/debuff/both) with a styled slider toggle, persisting selection to the build store, and displaying current emotional state with visual feedback.

nodes.name: Highlight.svelte
nodes.summary: Minimal Svelte component (16 lines) rendering text with highlighted search matches using the highlightTextParts utility, wrapping matched segments in <mark> tags.

nodes.name: LevelBar.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (417 lines) rendering the character level bar and HP fill slider — computes max HP from level, displays editable level input, HP percentage slider with protection threshold visualization, and persists level/HP-fill to localStorage.

nodes.name: AppHeader.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (134 lines) rendering the app header with VoxlBuilder branding, hint text, BuildSaves integration, and animated tab switcher between Overview and Analyze views with bubble transition effect.

nodes.name: boosts.ts
nodes.summary: Centralized numeric constants (44 exports) for all boost multipliers: frenzy, minion absorption, venom eater, holy infusion, bellowing ember, blood thirsty, perfection, stealth, golden crits, valor, undead might, wild bolt, guiding winds, vampire, and many more.

nodes.name: constants/buffs
nodes.summary: Numeric constants for buff potency, duration, and modifier values across all in-game buffs (rage, springblast, bastion, glyph conduit, etc.).

nodes.name: constants/cdr
nodes.summary: Cooldown reduction percentage constants for various rune and weapon art sources (caster, whirlwind, poison accel, etc.).

nodes.name: constants/damage-types
nodes.summary: Damage type metadata, defense tracking types, inheritance rules for physical/magic damage types, and fallback color.

nodes.name: constants/debuff-effects
nodes.summary: Constants for debuff effect formulas: weakness calculation, defense conversion, sticky damage multiplier, and despair display/damage coefficients.

nodes.name: constants/defensive
nodes.summary: Damage reduction constants per stack for defensive mechanics: barbskin, stoneskin, adaptive plate, protector spirit, valor shield, frenzy, etc.

nodes.name: constants/dot-damage
nodes.summary: Damage-over-time constants: base damage, scaling factors for bleed/burn/poison/caustic types, potency power, rounding, and slow multipliers.

nodes.name: constants/draconic-colors
nodes.summary: Draconic color-based multiplier constants for fire/air/earth/water/hex elements affecting speed, damage, stun, knockback, and cooldown.

nodes.name: constants/draconic
nodes.summary: Draconic infusion potency/duration multipliers, dragon state HP constants, and bastion blessing multiplier.

nodes.name: constants/heals
nodes.summary: Critical healing base values, holy boost divisor, per-stack healing bonus, and ocean song per-stack constant.

nodes.name: constants/index
nodes.summary: Barrel file that re-exports all sub-modules from the constants directory for unified access.

nodes.name: constants/perk-based-damage
nodes.summary: Base damage, per-stack scaling, healing, and poise damage constants for perk-triggered abilities: dragon claw/bubble, springblast, spirits, bounce momentum, whirlwind, volatile shell, etc.

nodes.name: constants/perks
nodes.summary: Perk-specific numeric constants for damage multipliers, crit calculations, elemental penetration, and conditional effects (luminescent, spirit winds, emotional, toxin transfer, etc.).

nodes.name: constants/rune-base-damage
nodes.summary: Base damage and hit count constants for rune-triggered abilities: ancient cleric, beenade, boostshroom, thunderous charge, sporeling toss, caci/cacitrops, hex web, brainblast, rocky tail.

nodes.name: constants/stat-conversions
nodes.summary: Stat conversion constants for perk-based stat transformation: weight distribution, quick-witted, carapace, frozen heart, spellshield, righted wrongs, rawny, etc.

nodes.name: constants/storage
nodes.summary: localStorage key definitions, build state defaults, save key mapping/unmapping, enchantment maps, max build slots, and confirm timeout.

nodes.name: constants/thresholds
nodes.summary: Numerical thresholds: armor penetration branch point, minimum cooldown duration, and base critical damage percentage.

nodes.name: EnchantSelect
nodes.summary: Svelte component providing an enchantment selection UI with search, filtering, and slot-specific enchantment display.

nodes.name: engine/engine
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting engine sub-modules for the damage calculation engine.

nodes.name: Modal
nodes.summary: Generic reusable modal dialog component with backdrop, close behavior, and slot content.

nodes.name: AccessorySelectModal
nodes.summary: Modal component for selecting accessories (rings, runes) with item comparison and stat display.

nodes.name: GuildModal
nodes.summary: Modal component for selecting guilds with guild rank display and selection UI.

nodes.name: modals/index
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting all modal components: RaceModal, GuildModal, AccessorySelectModal, WeaponPartModal.

nodes.name: RaceModal
nodes.summary: Modal component for selecting character races with race description and stat bonus display.

nodes.name: WeaponPartModal
nodes.summary: Modal component for selecting weapon parts (blades, handles, essences, gloves) with stat comparison.

nodes.name: StatFilterShared
nodes.summary: Shared Svelte component providing reusable stat filtering UI controls for filtering by stat values.

nodes.name: elementalBoosts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines StatDef interface and two constant arrays listing elemental boost stat keys and their negative-prefixed counterparts for UI filtering.

nodes.name: ELEMENTAL_BOOST_STATS
nodes.summary: Array of 10 StatDef objects mapping elemental boost stat keys to display labels.

nodes.name: NEGATIVE_ELEMENTAL_BOOST_STATS
nodes.summary: Derived array of ELEMENTAL_BOOST_STATS with 'neg:' prefix on each key for negative stat filtering UI.

nodes.name: filterActions.ts
nodes.summary: Factory function createFilterActions returning toggle/remove/clear/keydown handlers for managing include/exclude filter state on a Map.

nodes.name: createFilterActions
nodes.summary: Factory creating filter action handlers cycling through off/include/exclude states and notifying on changes.

nodes.name: toast.ts
nodes.summary: Svelte writable store for toast notifications with auto-dismiss via setTimeout.

nodes.name: addToast
nodes.summary: Adds a toast message with auto-removal timer, returns unique ID.

nodes.name: removeToast
nodes.summary: Removes a toast by ID from the writable store.

nodes.name: Toast.svelte
nodes.summary: Fixed-position toast notification container rendering active toasts with fly transition and type-based styling.

nodes.name: uiConstants.ts
nodes.summary: Centralized UI constants: UI_COLORS for damage types/tags/sources/enchantments, SOURCE_LABELS, plus private STAT_LABELS and TAG_LABELS.

nodes.name: UI_COLORS
nodes.summary: Constant object mapping semantic color names to hex values for damage types, tag groups, source types, enchant rarities.

nodes.name: SOURCE_LABELS
nodes.summary: Constant mapping source types (rune/perk/weaponArt/race/cantrip) to display labels.

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Application entry point: mounts root App.svelte to #app, imports global CSS, injects Vercel analytics.

nodes.name: ModalSearchHeader.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable modal header combining search input with SuggestDrop, TagFilter, StatFilter/WeaponStatFilter, and optional sort buttons.

nodes.name: MountIcon.svelte
nodes.summary: Small inline SVG mount (lightning bolt) icon with configurable size and unique gradient ID.

nodes.name: ScalingBreakdownRow.svelte
nodes.summary: Renders a single damage scaling breakdown row: type label × boost = contribution.

nodes.name: StatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible stat filter with Positive/Negative tabs, grouped chips (Boost/Defense/Utility), three-state toggle, sort mode, and active filter display.

nodes.name: SuggestDrop.svelte
nodes.summary: Dropdown suggestion list for modal search with name/perk type badges and highlighted text matching.

nodes.name: TagFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible tag filter panel with grouped tags, expandable drawer, active chip summary, clear-all, and tag hiding support.

nodes.name: WeaponStatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible weapon stat filter with three groups (Dmg Type/Scaling/Boost), three-state chips, tag prefixes, and exported matchesFilter function.

nodes.name: WeaponStatsDisplay.svelte
nodes.summary: Displays weapon stats split into three groups (Dmg Type, Scaling, Stats) as colored pills with proper formatting.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build config: Svelte plugin, PWA with auto-update and StaleWhileRevalidate HTML caching, base path /voxlblade-builder/.

layers.name: Entry Point
layers.description: Application bootstrap files that mount the Svelte app and load global styles. These are the first files executed by Vite/Node.

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: Svelte 5 components rendering the calculator interface — damage breakdowns, buff lists, equipment modals, search/filter controls, icons, and the app header.

layers.name: Calculation Engine
layers.description: Core damage calculation system — build orchestration, weapon merging, enchantment application, crit/defense resolution, buff/debuff processing, and all game-mechanic calculation logic.

layers.name: Game Data
layers.description: Static JSON data files defining all game entities — races, guilds, perks, armors, weapons (blades, handles, gloves, essences), rings, runes, and enchantments.

layers.name: State Management
layers.description: Svelte writable stores managing application state — the active build, calculation results, localStorage persistence, toast notifications, and build save/load actions.

layers.name: Foundation (Types, Constants & Utilities)
layers.description: Shared type definitions, centralized numeric constants, and utility functions consumed across all other layers. The most imported layer (types.ts: fan-in 20, constants.ts: fan-in 9).

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Build tool configs, TypeScript compiler settings, deployment configs, and code quality tooling (Fallow duplicate detection).

layers.name: Infrastructure & Documentation
layers.description: CI/CD pipelines, deployment workflows, project documentation, and analysis tooling metadata.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Voxlblade is a Svelte 5 + TypeScript + Vite game damage calculator and build optimizer for a fantasy RPG. It lets players configure equipment (weapons, armor, rings, runes), select perks and guilds, then computes detailed per-hit damage breakdowns across 8+ damage types with crit, defense, buffs, and DoT analysis. The app deploys as a PWA to GitHub Pages and Vercel.
tour.languageLesson: Svelte 5 runes + TypeScript 6 with Vite 8 bundler. Single runtime dependency (@vercel/analytics) — all game logic is self-contained.

tour.title: Application Bootstrap
tour.description: index.html loads src/main.ts, which mounts the root App.svelte component to a #app div and imports global CSS. Vite handles HMR and module resolution. The app is a standard SPA with no server-side rendering.
tour.languageLesson: Svelte 5 uses the new runes API ($state, $derived, $effect). Entry point is minimal — all orchestration lives in App.svelte.

tour.title: Type System Foundation
tour.description: src/lib/types.ts is the most-imported file (fan-in: 16). It defines stat keys, percent stats, damage type colors/priority, scaling-to-boost mappings, upgrade logic, and proc coefficient helpers. Every calculation module and UI component depends on these shared types and constants.
tour.languageLesson: Centralized type constants pattern: types.ts holds both TypeScript types AND runtime lookup maps (DAMAGE_TYPE_COLORS, SCALING_TO_BOOST, etc.). This avoids circular dependencies while keeping type-safe access.

tour.title: Constants System
tour.description: The constants directory contains 15+ focused modules organized by game domain: boosts, buffs, damage-types, defensive, dot-damage, draconic, heals, perks, rune-base-damage, stat-conversions, storage, and thresholds. Each module exports plain numeric constants consumed by the engine and data layers.
tour.languageLesson: Barrel re-export pattern: constants/index.ts re-exports all sub-modules, so consumers can import from 'constants' or 'constants/boosts' depending on granularity needs.

tour.title: Game Data Layer
tour.description: 11 JSON data files define every game entity: 10 races, 6 guilds with 3 ranks each, 200+ perks, 50+ armor sets, 35 rings, 41 runes, 51 enchantments, and weapon parts (40+ blades, handles, gloves, essences). These are loaded at runtime by engine/data/ accessor modules that provide typed lookup functions like getRace(), getPerk(), getBlade().
tour.languageLesson: Data accessor pattern: engine/data/ modules wrap JSON imports with typed getter functions (getRace, getPerk, etc.), isolating data shape changes behind a stable API.

tour.title: Build Orchestration Engine
tour.description: src/lib/engine/build.ts is the highest fan-out file (12 imports) — the central orchestrator. calcBuild() runs the full pipeline: accumulateEquipment() → finalizePerks() → applyStatBoostPerks() → calcCDR() → calcBoosts() → calcCrit() → computeBuffs() → deriveResults(). It coordinates weapon merging, enchantment application, shrine bonuses, and produces the final damage result object.
tour.languageLesson: Pipeline orchestration pattern: build.ts is a pure-function pipeline with no UI dependencies. Each step (accumulate, finalize, calcBoosts, deriveResults) is a separate function, making the flow traceable.

tour.title: Buff and Debuff Processing
tour.description: BuffData.ts (1600+ lines) is the largest data module. assembleActiveBuffs() is the master pipeline: collects buffs from perks, weapon arts, and racial effects → applies perk modifiers (specific, generic, bastion, trickster) → processes toxin transfer and tailwind conversion → applies cauterize conversion. Supporting modules handle draconic infusions, auto-debuffs from perks, and combat effects (weakness, shatter, sticky).
tour.languageLesson: The buff system uses a factory + modifier pipeline: raw buffs are collected from multiple sources, then each modifier function transforms the buff array in sequence. This is similar to middleware chains in web frameworks.

tour.title: Damage Calculation Subsystems
tour.description: Several specialized modules handle distinct damage mechanics: crit.ts computes crit chance/damage with proc-weighted averages; defense.ts resolves damage reduction from armor and perks; damageTypeResolve.ts handles fire→air→magic conversion chains; DoTDamage.ts computes bleed/burn/poison ticks; HealBoost.ts aggregates healing modifiers; Perkbasedmg.ts defines perk-triggered abilities with HP gates.
tour.languageLesson: Each subsystem is independently testable: crit, defense, and damage-type resolution are pure functions with no side effects. The HP gate pattern in Perkbasedmg.ts uses a guard clause returning undefined when conditions aren't met.

tour.title: State Management and Persistence
tour.description: src/lib/store.ts uses Svelte writable stores for the active build state and computed results. Actions (setGuild, setEnchantment, clearBuild) mutate the store. localStorage persistence is handled via constants/storage.ts keys and BuildSaves.svelte, which provides save/load/export/import with named slots, confirm-delete UX, and file import. Toast notifications use a separate store with auto-dismiss.
tour.languageLesson: Svelte stores + localStorage pattern: the store exposes mutation actions rather than direct set() calls. Persistence is layered: store → localStorage read on load, store → JSON.stringify on save.

tour.title: Root Component and UI Architecture
tour.description: App.svelte (3699 lines) is the root orchestrator managing all build state and rendering equipment modals (race, guild, armor, weapon parts), weapon art selection, buff/debuff lists, and damage analysis tabs. DamageAnalyzer.svelte (6565 lines) is the largest component, computing full damage analysis by integrating all engine subsystems. The UI uses a modal system (Modal.svelte + specialized modals) with search/filter capabilities (TagFilter, StatFilter, WeaponStatFilter).
tour.languageLesson: Component composition: small reusable pieces (Modal, Highlight, CritIcon, MountIcon) compose into large orchestrators (App → DamageAnalyzer → BaseDamageCalc → ScalingBreakdownRow). The filter system uses a three-state toggle pattern (off/include/exclude) via createFilterActions factory.

tour.title: Deployment and CI/CD
tour.description: The project deploys to both GitHub Pages (via .github/workflows/static.yml using Node.js 24, npm build, and actions/deploy-pages) and Vercel (via vercel.json with Vite preset and PWA caching headers). Fallow (.fallowrc.json) provides duplicate detection and security analysis. The PWA uses StaleWhileRevalidate caching for offline support.
tour.languageLesson: Dual deployment: GitHub Pages for open-source hosting, Vercel for production. Vite PWA plugin auto-generates the service worker with caching strategies defined in vite.config.ts.
